TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_bzyok, title = bzyok, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/bzyok} }

S.FORM: == bzyok == qmayat bzyok hopa aga niqun ta la. mnoyas balay qu bzyok qnhyun hiya'. mutu wahan maniq na bzyok qnhyun qu bway na bgayaw. sapat mha ni sqliqun ta' 'laqi' kneril lga, mutu ta' msina' pira' bzyok galan ta' sapat.

== bzyok == qmayat bzyok hopa aga niqun ta la. mnoyas balay qu bzyok qnhyun hiya'. mutu wahan maniq na bzyok qnhyun qu bway na bgayaw. sapat mha ni sqliqun ta' 'laqi' kneril lga, mutu ta' msina' pira' bzyok galan ta' sapat.
S.PHON: == βzjok == qmajat βzjok ħopa aɣa niqun ta la. mnojas~ɕ βalaj qu βzjok qnħjun ħijaʔ. mutu waħan maniq na βzjok qnħjun qu βwaj na βɣajaw. s~ɕapat mħa ni s~ɕqliqun taʔ ʔlaqiʔ kneril lɣa, mutu taʔ ms~ɕinaʔ piraʔ βzjok ɣalan taʔ s~ɕapat.
